item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-042","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response explicitly arbitrates the premise: it accepts the long-term direction that AI will improve QA, but blocks the irreversible organizational action of dissolving QA now. It downgrades the action into QA transformation, AI-assisted testing adoption, measurement over 1-2 quarters, and gradual adjustment based on defect escape, automation coverage, incidents, and delivery metrics. This is not method stacking or simple agreement/disagreement."}
